---
title: "07_Temporal_Comp_fixed_shelf"
author: "Monique White"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library("FactoMineR")
library("factoextra")
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(vegan) #to do NMDS
library(PCAmixdata)
library(ggfortify)
library(glmmTMB) # Generalized Linear Mixed Models using Template Model Builder
library(DHARMa) # Diagnostics for Hierarchical (multi-level/mixed) regression models
library(ggpubr)
library(ggeffects) #to be able to do ggpredict
library(ggh4x) # to specify x and y axis if desired
library(MuMIn) #model selection function
library(ggrepel)
library(ggordiplots) #nmds and ordination plots

# Import and clean data
## Recruitment data
Coral_settlement_nGBR_CS <- read.csv("~/Larval recruitment resources/Data Analysis/Coral-Settlement-Northern-GBR/Coral settlement_nGBR_CS.csv") %>%
  mutate(across(15:29, ~replace_na(.x, 0))) # Read in data

Coral_settlement_nGBR <- Coral_settlement_nGBR_CS %>% 
  filter(Shelf.posn != "Coral Sea", #remove coral sea data
        !Obs %in% c(1499, 1621, 1622)) #Remove loose tiles with heavy biofouling

Coral_settlement_nGBR <- Coral_settlement_nGBR %>% 
  rename("Shelf"= Shelf.posn,
         "Year_Collected"= Year..Jan.,
         "Site_#"= Site..,
         "Acroporidae" =Acropora,
         "Pocilloporidae" = Pocillopora,
         "Poritid" = Porites) |> 
  mutate(Year_Collected = factor(Year_Collected))
  

Coral_settlement_nGBR <- Coral_settlement_nGBR |>
  filter(Shelf == "Outer" | (Shelf %in% c("Inner", "Mid") & Tile %in% as.character(1:10)))

Coral_settlement_nGBR$Year_Collected <- factor(Coral_settlement_nGBR$Year_Collected)

Coral_settlement_nGBR <- Coral_settlement_nGBR |> 
  mutate(
    Year = case_when(
      Year_Collected == "2022" ~ "2021-22",
      Year_Collected == "2023" ~ "2022-23",
      Year_Collected == "2024" ~ "2023-24",
      Year_Collected == "2025" ~ "2024-25",
      Year_Collected == "2026" ~ "2025-26"
  ),
  Deployment = case_when(
      Year_Collected == "2022" ~ "21/22",
      Year_Collected == "2023" ~ "22/23",
      Year_Collected == "2024" ~ "23/24",
      Year_Collected == "2025" ~ "24/25",
      Year_Collected == "2026" ~ "25/26"
  )) |> 
mutate(
  notes = case_when(
    notes %in% c("dislodged", "dislodged tile", "dettached tile") ~ "Dislodged",
    notes %in% c("lots of tube worms") ~ "Lots of tube worms",
    TRUE ~ notes
  ))

Coral_settlement_nGBR <- Coral_settlement_nGBR |> 
mutate(
  notes = case_when(
    !notes %in% c("Dislodged", "Lots of tube worms")~"No notes",
    TRUE ~ notes
  ))

Coral_settlement_nGBR <- Coral_settlement_nGBR |> 
  filter(notes != "Dislodged")


# Mean or mean no. tiles per site / year
Join_Coral <- Coral_settlement_nGBR |> 
  group_by(Shelf, Year, Site, Reef) |> 
  summarise(
    st_mean_acro = mean(Acroporidae),
    st_sd_acro = sd(Acroporidae),
    st_median_acro = median(Acroporidae),
    st_mean_poci = mean(Pocilloporidae),
    st_sd_poci = sd(Pocilloporidae),
    st_median_poci = median(Pocilloporidae),
    st_mean_por = mean(Poritid),
    st_sd_por = sd(Poritid),
    st_median_por = median(Poritid),
    st_mean_total = mean(total),
    st_sd_total = sd(total),
    Tiles = n()
  )

# Benthic Data

# Benthic Data
PIT <- PIT <- read_csv("PIT_final.csv") %>%
  mutate(across(8:94, ~replace_na(.x, 0))) %>%
  mutate(across(8:94, as.numeric))

PIT <- PIT %>% 
  filter(Year %in% c("2021-22", "2022-23", "2023-24", "2024-25", "2025-26"))

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      Site %in% c("Vicky-HS", "Vickys") ~ "Vicky-HS",
      Site %in% c("Turtle Beach", "TurtleB-CooksP") ~ "TurtleB-CooksP",
      Site %in% c("Lag2-Trimodal", "Lagoon") ~ "Lag2-Trimodal",
      Site == "Turtle South - Front (Sargassum)" ~ "TS_Crest",
      Site == "Turtle South - Coral" ~ "TS_Back",
      Site == "Turtle North - front" ~ "TN_Crest",
      TRUE ~ Site
    ),
    Reef = case_when(
      Site %in% c("Day 1", "Day 2", "Day 3") ~ "Day",
      Site %in% c("Hicks 1", "Hicks 2", "Hicks 3") ~ "Hicks",
      Site %in% c("Mac 1", "Mac 2", "Mac 3") ~ "MacGillivray",
      Site %in% c("TN_Back", "TN_coral", "TN_Crest") ~ "Turtle N",
      Site %in% c("TS_Back", "TS_Channel", "TS_Crest") ~ "Turtle S",
      Site %in% c("TurtleB-CooksP", "Lag2-Trimodal", "Vicky-HS") ~ "Lizard",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Site = factor(Site, levels = levels(PIT$Site))
  )


PIT<- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    Shelf = factor(Shelf),
    Reef = factor(Reef),
    Site = factor(Site))

PIT_detailed <- PIT |> 
  dplyr::select(1:93)

PIT <- PIT %>%
  mutate(
    Acroporidae = rowSums(select(., `Acropora - branching`:`Montipora`), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    Pocilloporidae = rowSums(select(., Pocillopora:Stylophora), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    Poritidae = rowSums(select(., `Porites - branching`:Goniopora), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    `Other Hard coral` = rowSums(select(., `Favia (plocoid)`:`other submassive`), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    `Soft coral` = rowSums(select(., Lobophytum:`Soft-other`), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Phaeophyceae` = rowSums(select(., Sargassum:Lobophora), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Rhodophyta` = rowSums(select(., Asparagopsis:Jania), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Chlorophyta`= rowSums(select(., Halimeda:Valonia), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Sand and Rubble` = rowSums(select(., Sand:Rubble), na.rm = TRUE),
    Turf = rowSums(select(., `Pavement/EAM`:`Dead massive`), na.rm = TRUE),
    Other = rowSums(select(., Sponge:Clam), na.rm = TRUE),
    Zoantharian = rowSums(select(., `Zoantharian - Red`:`Zoantharian - Green`), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

PIT <- PIT |> 
  select(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site, Transect, Acroporidae:Zoantharian,CCA, Cyanobacteria, Halophila)

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    sum = rowSums(across(Acroporidae:Halophila), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

summary(PIT$sum)

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    across(Acroporidae:Halophila, ~ .x * 2)
  )

join <- PIT |> 
  group_by(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site) |> 
  summarise(
    mean_aco = mean(Acroporidae),
    sd_aco = sd(Acroporidae),
    mean_poci = mean(Pocilloporidae),
    sd_poci = sd(Pocilloporidae),
    mean_por = mean(Poritidae),
    sd_por = sd(Poritidae)
  )

Combined <- left_join(Coral_settlement_nGBR, join)
# Juvenile data
Belt_10m <- read_csv("Belt_10m_final.csv") |> 
  mutate(across(8:28, ~replace_na(.x, 0)))

Belt_10m <- Belt_10m |> 
 mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      Site %in% c("Vicky-HS", "Vickys") ~ "Vicky-HS",
      Site %in% c("Turtle Beach", "TurtleB-CooksP") ~ "TurtleB-CooksP",
      Site %in% c("Lag2-Trimodal", "Lagoon") ~ "Lag2-Trimodal",
      Site == "Turtle South - Front (Sargassum)" ~ "TS_Crest",
      Site == "Turtle South - Coral" ~ "TS_Back",
      Site == "Turtle North - front" ~ "TN_Crest",
      TRUE ~ Site
    ),
    Reef = case_when(
      Site %in% c("Day 1", "Day 2", "Day 3") ~ "Day",
      Site %in% c("Hicks 1", "Hicks 2", "Hicks 3") ~ "Hicks",
      Site %in% c("Mac 1", "Mac 2", "Mac 3") ~ "MacGillivray",
      Site %in% c("TN_Back", "TN_coral", "TN_Crest") ~ "Turtle N",
      Site %in% c("TS_Back", "TS_Channel", "TS_Crest") ~ "Turtle S",
      Site %in% c("TurtleB-CooksP", "Lag2-Trimodal", "Vicky-HS") ~ "Lizard",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Site = factor(Site, levels = levels(PIT$Site))
  )

Belt_10m <- Belt_10m |> filter(Year %in% c("2021-22", "2022-23", "2023-24", "2024-25"))
Belt_10m <- Belt_10m |>
  mutate(
    Other_HC = Favia + Favites + Goniastrea + Astrea +
                 Echinopora + Galaxea + Turbinaria +
                 Psammacora + Pavona
  )

join_belt <- Belt_10m |> 
  group_by(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site) |> 
  summarise(
    mean_acro = mean(Acroporidae),
    sd_acro = sd(Acroporidae),
    mean_poci = mean(Pocilloporidae),
    sd_poci = sd(Pocilloporidae),
    mean_por = mean(Poritidae),
    sd_por = sd(Poritidae),
    mean_total = mean(Total_juveniles),
    sd_total = sd(Total_juveniles),
    Belt = n()
  )

Combined1 <- left_join(Coral_settlement_nGBR, join_belt)

```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:
###6.1.3.1 Inner
```{r}
# Step 1: Create site-by-species matrix with Site_ID
site_by_PIT_detailed <- PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Year, Reef, Shelf, Site, Transect, 8:93
  ) %>%
  mutate(Site_ID = paste(Year, Reef, Site, Transect, sep = "_"))

site_by_PIT_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed |> filter(Shelf == "Inner")

# Step 2: Metadata (KEEP Site_ID)
metadata_PIT_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(Shelf, Year, Reef)

# Step 3: Species matrix
PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(`Acropora - branching`:`Zoantharian - Green`
  )

# SQRT
PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed <- sqrt(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed)
```

```{r}
# create a distance matrix
PIT_dist_detailed <- vegdist(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed, method = "bray")

# To stratify by year (this asks "do shelf differences exist after accounting for year structure?") 
h <- how(blocks = metadata_PIT_detailed$Year)                                                   # restrict permutations within years
permanova_result <- adonis2(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed ~ Year,
  data = site_by_PIT_detailed,
  method = "bray",
  permutations = h)

print(permanova_result)


# With respect to Shelf
bd <- betadisper(PIT_dist_detailed, metadata_PIT_detailed$Year) 
permutest(bd, permutations = h) #0.001 
```
```{r}
nmds <- metaMDS(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 100)

#Check the Stress Value
nmds$stress


# Extract NMDS for plot
site_scores <- as.data.frame(vegan::scores(nmds, display = "sites"))
scores <- cbind(site_scores, metadata_PIT_detailed[, c("Year", "Shelf", "Reef")])

scores <- scores |> 
  mutate(
    Deployment =
    case_when(
      Year == "2024-25" ~ "24/25",
      Year == "2023-24" ~ "23/24",
      Year == "2022-23" ~ "22/23",
      Year == "2021-22" ~ "21/22")
  )
```

```{r}
# Function to generate ellipse points for ggplot
ellipse_points <- function(ell_obj, npoints = 100) {
  do.call(rbind,
    lapply(names(ell_obj), function(g) {
      center <- ell_obj[[g]]$center      # centroid
      cov_mat <- ell_obj[[g]]$cov        # covariance matrix
      angles <- seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = npoints)
      circle <- cbind(cos(angles), sin(angles))
      # scale unit circle by sqrt of covariance (1 SD)
      ellipse <- t(center + t(circle %*% chol(cov_mat)))
      data.frame(NMDS1 = ellipse[,1],
                 NMDS2 = ellipse[,2],
                 Year = g)
    })
  )
}

ell <- ordiellipse(nmds, groups = scores$Year, kind = "sd", draw = "none")
ell_df <- ellipse_points(ell, npoints = 100)
```


```{r}
# Creating Vectors for driving the patterns
Benthic_envfit <- envfit(
  nmds,
  PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed,
  permutations = h
) 

# Extract p-values
pvals <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$pvals

# Extract r-squared values
r2 <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$r
# Arrow coordinates
vec_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(Benthic_envfit, display = "vectors"))

# Add r2 and p-values
vec_scores$r2 <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$r
vec_scores$pval <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$pvals

vec_scores
#Saving the vectors as a data frame

vec_scores <- vec_scores |> 
  filter(pval < 0.05,  # filter to only show vectors that are significant drivers.
          r2 > 0.2) # filter to only have the strong drivers

Benthic_envfit <- vec_scores |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "label_category")

#Other, Zoantharian, Poritidae...
```

```{r}
detailed_benthic <- ggplot()+
  geom_segment(data = Benthic_envfit, aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend=NMDS1, yend = NMDS2),
             arrow = arrow(length = unit(1/3, "picas")),
             linetype = "solid",
             linewidth = 0.5)+
     geom_point(data =  scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Year), size = 1, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_path(data = ell_df,
            aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Year, group = Year),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
   geom_text_repel(data = Benthic_envfit,
                  aes(x = NMDS1, y= NMDS2, label = label_category),
                  inherit.aes = FALSE,
                   size = 2.5,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    force = 2,
    max.iter = 20000,
    box.padding = 0.3,
    point.padding = 0.2)+
    # stat_ellipse(aes(group = Shelf, colour = Shelf),
    #              level = 0.75, linewidth = 0.5) +
     theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
     theme(
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  legend.position = c(0.2, 0.05),   # x = centre, y = near bottom
  legend.justification = c(0.5, 0), # anchor legend by bottom-centre
  legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
  legend.direction = "horizontal",
  text = element_text(size = 8),
  title = element_text(size = 8)
)+
     labs(
         x = "NMDS1",
        y = "NMDS2",
         colour = "Austral Summer"
    ) +
  #scale_colour_manual(values = c("#9e379f"))+
    annotate("text",
         x = 1.05,     # right limit
         y = -1,       # bottom limit
         label = paste0("Stress = ", round(nmds$stress, 3)),
         hjust = 1.05, # push slightly inward
         vjust = -0.5, # lift slightly above bottom
         size = 3)#+
  #facet_wrap(~Year)
  # scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1.3, 1.05))+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1, 0.9))
detailed_benthic

# ggsave(filename = "figures/detailed_benthic_r2_0.2_p_0.05.PDF", 
#        plot = detailed_benthic, width = 250, height = 150, unit = "mm")
```

###6.1.3.2 Mid Shelf
```{r}
# Step 1: Create site-by-species matrix with Site_ID
site_by_PIT_detailed <- PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Year, Reef, Shelf, Site, Transect, 8:93
  ) %>%
  mutate(Site_ID = paste(Year, Reef, Site, Transect, sep = "_"))

site_by_PIT_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed |> filter(Shelf == "Mid")

# Step 2: Metadata (KEEP Site_ID)
metadata_PIT_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(Shelf, Year, Reef)

# Step 3: Species matrix
PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(`Acropora - branching`:`Zoantharian - Green`
  )

# SQRT
PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed <- sqrt(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed)
```

```{r}
# create a distance matrix
PIT_dist_detailed <- vegdist(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed, method = "bray")

# To stratify by year (this asks "do shelf differences exist after accounting for year structure?") 
h <- how(blocks = metadata_PIT_detailed$Year)                                                   # restrict permutations within years
permanova_result <- adonis2(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed ~ Year,
  data = site_by_PIT_detailed,
  method = "bray",
  permutations = h)

print(permanova_result)


# With respect to Shelf
bd <- betadisper(PIT_dist_detailed, metadata_PIT_detailed$Year) 
permutest(bd, permutations = h) #0.001 
```
```{r}
nmds <- metaMDS(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 100)

#Check the Stress Value
nmds$stress


# Extract NMDS for plot
site_scores <- as.data.frame(vegan::scores(nmds, display = "sites"))
scores <- cbind(site_scores, metadata_PIT_detailed[, c("Year", "Shelf", "Reef")])

scores <- scores |> 
  mutate(
    Deployment =
    case_when(
      Year == "2024-25" ~ "24/25",
      Year == "2023-24" ~ "23/24",
      Year == "2022-23" ~ "22/23",
      Year == "2021-22" ~ "21/22")
  )
```

```{r}
# Function to generate ellipse points for ggplot
ellipse_points <- function(ell_obj, npoints = 100) {
  do.call(rbind,
    lapply(names(ell_obj), function(g) {
      center <- ell_obj[[g]]$center      # centroid
      cov_mat <- ell_obj[[g]]$cov        # covariance matrix
      angles <- seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = npoints)
      circle <- cbind(cos(angles), sin(angles))
      # scale unit circle by sqrt of covariance (1 SD)
      ellipse <- t(center + t(circle %*% chol(cov_mat)))
      data.frame(NMDS1 = ellipse[,1],
                 NMDS2 = ellipse[,2],
                 Year = g)
    })
  )
}

ell <- ordiellipse(nmds, groups = scores$Year, kind = "sd", draw = "none")
ell_df <- ellipse_points(ell, npoints = 100)
```


```{r}
# Creating Vectors for driving the patterns
Benthic_envfit <- envfit(
  nmds,
  PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed,
  permutations = h
) 

# Extract p-values
pvals <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$pvals

# Extract r-squared values
r2 <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$r
# Arrow coordinates
vec_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(Benthic_envfit, display = "vectors"))

# Add r2 and p-values
vec_scores$r2 <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$r
vec_scores$pval <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$pvals

vec_scores
#Saving the vectors as a data frame

vec_scores <- vec_scores |> 
  filter(pval < 0.05,  # filter to only show vectors that are significant drivers.
          r2 > 0.2) # filter to only have the strong drivers

Benthic_envfit <- vec_scores |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "label_category")

#Other, Zoantharian, Poritidae...
```

```{r}
detailed_benthic <- ggplot()+
  geom_segment(data = Benthic_envfit, aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend=NMDS1, yend = NMDS2),
             arrow = arrow(length = unit(1/3, "picas")),
             linetype = "solid",
             linewidth = 0.5)+
     geom_point(data =  scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Year), size = 1, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_path(data = ell_df,
            aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Year, group = Year),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
   geom_text_repel(data = Benthic_envfit,
                  aes(x = NMDS1, y= NMDS2, label = label_category),
                  inherit.aes = FALSE,
                   size = 2.5,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    force = 2,
    max.iter = 20000,
    box.padding = 0.3,
    point.padding = 0.2)+
    # stat_ellipse(aes(group = Shelf, colour = Shelf),
    #              level = 0.75, linewidth = 0.5) +
     theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
     theme(
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  legend.position = c(0.2, 0.05),   # x = centre, y = near bottom
  legend.justification = c(0.5, 0), # anchor legend by bottom-centre
  legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
  legend.direction = "horizontal",
  text = element_text(size = 8),
  title = element_text(size = 8)
)+
     labs(
         x = "NMDS1",
        y = "NMDS2",
         colour = "Austral Summer"
    ) +
  #scale_colour_manual(values = c("#9e379f"))+
    annotate("text",
         x = 1.05,     # right limit
         y = -1,       # bottom limit
         label = paste0("Stress = ", round(nmds$stress, 3)),
         hjust = 1.05, # push slightly inward
         vjust = -0.5, # lift slightly above bottom
         size = 3)#+
  #facet_wrap(~Year)
  # scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1.3, 1.05))+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1, 0.9))
detailed_benthic

# ggsave(filename = "figures/detailed_benthic_r2_0.2_p_0.05.PDF", 
#        plot = detailed_benthic, width = 250, height = 150, unit = "mm")
```

###6.1.3.3 Outer Shelf
```{r}
# Step 1: Create site-by-species matrix with Site_ID
site_by_PIT_detailed <- PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Year, Reef, Shelf, Site, Transect, 8:93
  ) %>%
  mutate(Site_ID = paste(Year, Reef, Site, Transect, sep = "_"))

site_by_PIT_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed |> filter(Shelf == "Outer")

# Step 2: Metadata (KEEP Site_ID)
metadata_PIT_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(Shelf, Year, Reef)

# Step 3: Species matrix
PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed <- site_by_PIT_detailed %>%
  dplyr::select(`Acropora - branching`:`Zoantharian - Green`
  )

# SQRT
PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed <- sqrt(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed)
```

```{r}
# create a distance matrix
PIT_dist_detailed <- vegdist(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed, method = "bray")

# To stratify by year (this asks "do shelf differences exist after accounting for year structure?") 
h <- how(blocks = metadata_PIT_detailed$Year)                                                   # restrict permutations within years
permanova_result <- adonis2(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed ~ Year,
  data = site_by_PIT_detailed,
  method = "bray",
  permutations = h)

print(permanova_result)


# With respect to Shelf
bd <- betadisper(PIT_dist_detailed, metadata_PIT_detailed$Year) 
permutest(bd, permutations = h) #0.001 
```
```{r}
nmds <- metaMDS(PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 100)

#Check the Stress Value
nmds$stress


# Extract NMDS for plot
site_scores <- as.data.frame(vegan::scores(nmds, display = "sites"))
scores <- cbind(site_scores, metadata_PIT_detailed[, c("Year", "Shelf", "Reef")])

scores <- scores |> 
  mutate(
    Deployment =
    case_when(
      Year == "2024-25" ~ "24/25",
      Year == "2023-24" ~ "23/24",
      Year == "2022-23" ~ "22/23",
      Year == "2021-22" ~ "21/22")
  )
```

```{r}
# Function to generate ellipse points for ggplot
ellipse_points <- function(ell_obj, npoints = 100) {
  do.call(rbind,
    lapply(names(ell_obj), function(g) {
      center <- ell_obj[[g]]$center      # centroid
      cov_mat <- ell_obj[[g]]$cov        # covariance matrix
      angles <- seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = npoints)
      circle <- cbind(cos(angles), sin(angles))
      # scale unit circle by sqrt of covariance (1 SD)
      ellipse <- t(center + t(circle %*% chol(cov_mat)))
      data.frame(NMDS1 = ellipse[,1],
                 NMDS2 = ellipse[,2],
                 Year = g)
    })
  )
}

ell <- ordiellipse(nmds, groups = scores$Year, kind = "sd", draw = "none")
ell_df <- ellipse_points(ell, npoints = 100)
```


```{r}
# Creating Vectors for driving the patterns
Benthic_envfit <- envfit(
  nmds,
  PIT_matrix_filtered_detailed,
  permutations = h
) 

# Extract p-values
pvals <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$pvals

# Extract r-squared values
r2 <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$r
# Arrow coordinates
vec_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(Benthic_envfit, display = "vectors"))

# Add r2 and p-values
vec_scores$r2 <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$r
vec_scores$pval <- Benthic_envfit$vectors$pvals

vec_scores
#Saving the vectors as a data frame

vec_scores <- vec_scores |> 
  filter(pval < 0.05,  # filter to only show vectors that are significant drivers.
          r2 > 0.2) # filter to only have the strong drivers

Benthic_envfit <- vec_scores |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "label_category")

#Other, Zoantharian, Poritidae...
```

```{r}
detailed_benthic <- ggplot()+
  geom_segment(data = Benthic_envfit, aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend=NMDS1, yend = NMDS2),
             arrow = arrow(length = unit(1/3, "picas")),
             linetype = "solid",
             linewidth = 0.5)+
     geom_point(data =  scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Year), size = 1, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_path(data = ell_df,
            aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Year, group = Year),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
   geom_text_repel(data = Benthic_envfit,
                  aes(x = NMDS1, y= NMDS2, label = label_category),
                  inherit.aes = FALSE,
                   size = 2.5,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    force = 2,
    max.iter = 20000,
    box.padding = 0.3,
    point.padding = 0.2)+
    # stat_ellipse(aes(group = Shelf, colour = Shelf),
    #              level = 0.75, linewidth = 0.5) +
     theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
     theme(
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  legend.position = c(0.2, 0.05),   # x = centre, y = near bottom
  legend.justification = c(0.5, 0), # anchor legend by bottom-centre
  legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
  legend.direction = "horizontal",
  text = element_text(size = 8),
  title = element_text(size = 8)
)+
     labs(
         x = "NMDS1",
        y = "NMDS2",
         colour = "Austral Summer"
    ) +
  #scale_colour_manual(values = c("#9e379f"))+
    annotate("text",
         x = 1.05,     # right limit
         y = -1,       # bottom limit
         label = paste0("Stress = ", round(nmds$stress, 3)),
         hjust = 1.05, # push slightly inward
         vjust = -0.5, # lift slightly above bottom
         size = 3)#+
  #facet_wrap(~Year)
  # scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1.3, 1.05))+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1, 0.9))
detailed_benthic

# ggsave(filename = "figures/detailed_benthic_r2_0.2_p_0.05.PDF", 
#        plot = detailed_benthic, width = 250, height = 150, unit = "mm")
```


# 2.1 Juvenile corals more detailed

```{r}
# Belt_10m <- Belt_10m |> 
#   rename("Other Hard Coral" = Other_HC
#   )
# Step 1: Create site-by-species matrix with Site_ID
site_by_belt <- Belt_10m %>%
  filter(Total_juveniles > 0) |> #filter to make sure that dissimilarities are non zero
  dplyr::select(
    Year, Reef, Shelf, Site, Transect, Acropora:Pavona
  ) %>%
  mutate(Site_ID = paste(Year, Reef, Site, Transect, sep = "_"))


# Step 2: Metadata (KEEP Site_ID)
metadata_belt <- site_by_belt %>%
  dplyr::select(Shelf, Year, Reef)

# Step 3: Species matrix
belt_matrix_filtered <- site_by_belt %>%
  dplyr::select(
    6:21
  )

belt_matrix_filtered <- sqrt(belt_matrix_filtered)

```
```{r}
# create a distance matrix
belt_dist <- vegdist(belt_matrix_filtered, method = "bray")

# To stratify by year (this asks "do shelf differences exist after accounting for year structure?") 
h <- how(blocks = metadata_belt$Shelf)                                                   # restrict permutations within years
# With respect to Shelf
bd <- betadisper(belt_dist, metadata_belt$Year) #calculates distance to centroids (dispersion)
#anova(bd) # Significant was <0.001
permutest(bd, 
          permutations = h) #PERMDISP #0.41 so no signficant difference between centroids
```

```{r}
# To stratify by year (this asks "do shelf differences exist after accounting for year structure?") 
h <- how(blocks = metadata_belt$Shelf)                                                   # restrict permutations within years

#Bray curtis PERMANOVA
permanova_result <- adonis2(belt_matrix_filtered ~ Year, 
        data = metadata_belt, 
        permutations = h,
        method = "bray")   # PERMANOVA



print(permanova_result) #p =0.005 but only explains 5% of variation, so like what is the point lol
```

```{r}
nmds <- metaMDS(belt_matrix_filtered, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 100)

#Check the Stress Value
nmds$stress #0.16

# Extract NMDS for plot
site_scores <- as.data.frame(vegan::scores(nmds, display = "sites"))
scores <- cbind(site_scores, metadata_belt[, c("Year", "Shelf", "Reef")])

scores <- scores |> 
  mutate(
    Deployment =
    case_when(
      Year == "2024-25" ~ "24/25",
      Year == "2023-24" ~ "23/24",
      Year == "2022-23" ~ "22/23",
      Year == "2021-22" ~ "21/22")
  )
```

```{r}
library(MASS)  # for mvrnorm
library(vegan)

# Function to generate ellipse points for ggplot
ellipse_points <- function(ell_obj, npoints = 100) {
  do.call(rbind,
    lapply(names(ell_obj), function(g) {
      center <- ell_obj[[g]]$center      # centroid
      cov_mat <- ell_obj[[g]]$cov        # covariance matrix
      angles <- seq(0, 2*pi, length.out = npoints)
      circle <- cbind(cos(angles), sin(angles))
      # scale unit circle by sqrt of covariance (1 SD)
      ellipse <- t(center + t(circle %*% chol(cov_mat)))
      data.frame(NMDS1 = ellipse[,1],
                 NMDS2 = ellipse[,2],
                 Shelf = g)
    })
  )
}

ell <- ordiellipse(nmds, groups = scores$Shelf, kind = "sd", draw = "none")
ell_df <- ellipse_points(ell, npoints = 100)
```


```{r}
belt_A <- ggplot(scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2,                          colour = Shelf)) +
     geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_path(data = ell_df,
            aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Shelf, group = Shelf),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
  
    # stat_ellipse(aes(group = Shelf, colour = Shelf),
    #              level = 0.75, linewidth = 0.5) +
     theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
     theme(
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  legend.position = c(0.5, 0.05),   # x = centre, y = near bottom
  legend.justification = c(0.5, 0), # anchor legend by bottom-centre
  legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
  legend.direction = "horizontal",
  text = element_text(size = 9),
  title = element_text(size = 9)
) +
     labs(
         x = "NMDS1",
        y = "NMDS2",
         colour = "Shelf"
    ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+
    annotate("text",
         x = 0.95,     # right limit
         y = -0.75,       # bottom limit
         label = paste0("Stress = ", round(nmds$stress, 3)),
         hjust = 1.05, # push slightly inward
         vjust = -0.5, # lift slightly above bottom
         size = 3)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
  # scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.85, 1))+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1.05, 0.95))

belt_A
```
This random point way out at NMDS1 with a value of 6 is Turtle S, and it is a belt transect where there was only one Favia juvenile observed.

```{r}
# To stratify by year (this asks "do shelf differences exist after accounting for year structure?") 
h <- how(blocks = metadata_belt$Shelf)                                                   # restrict permutations within years

# Creating Vectors for driving the patterns
belt_envfit <- envfit(
  nmds,
  belt_matrix_filtered,
  permutations = h #restricts permuatations to a year
) 

# Extract p-values
pvals <- belt_envfit$vectors$pvals

# Extract r-squared values
r2 <- belt_envfit$vectors$r
# Arrow coordinates
vec_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(belt_envfit, display = "vectors"))

# Add r2 and p-values
vec_scores$r2 <- belt_envfit$vectors$r
vec_scores$pval <- belt_envfit$vectors$pvals

vec_scores
#Saving the vectors as a data frame

belt_envfit <- vec_scores |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "label_category")
```
```{r}
belt_w_vectors <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = belt_envfit, aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend=NMDS1, yend = NMDS2),
             arrow = arrow(length = unit(1/3, "picas")),
             linetype = "solid",
             linewidth = 0.5)+
  geom_text_repel(data = belt_envfit,
                  aes(x = NMDS1, y= NMDS2, label = label_category),
                  inherit.aes = FALSE,
                  size = 2.5,
                  box.padding = 0.1, 
                  min.segment.length = Inf,
                  nudge_x = -0.05,
                  nudge_y = -0.1)+
  geom_point(data = scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Shelf), size = 1, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_path(data = ell_df,
            aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, colour = Shelf, group = Shelf),
            linewidth = 0.6) +
     theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
     theme(
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  legend.position = c(0.75, 0.85),   # x = centre, y = near bottom
  legend.justification = c(0.5, 0), # anchor legend by bottom-centre
  legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
  legend.direction = "horizontal",
  text = element_text(size = 9),
  title = element_text(size = 9)
) +
     labs(
         x = "NMDS1",
        y = "NMDS2",
         colour = "Shelf"
    ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#A8C85A", "#9e379f", "#C97B5F"))+
    annotate("text",
         x = 0.95,     # right limit
         y = -0.75,       # bottom limit
         label = paste0("Stress = ", round(nmds$stress, 3)),
         hjust = 1.05, # push slightly inward
         vjust = -0.5, # lift slightly above bottom
         size = 3)+
  facet_wrap(~Year, ncol = 1)

belt_w_vectors

```

```{r eval = FALSE}
ggsave(belt_w_vectors,
  filename = "figures/juv_vec_nms.PDF",
  height = 125, width = 150,
  units = "mm"
)
```


#Trying Benthic cover while keeping the detailed categories for corals

```{r}
# Benthic Data
PIT <- PIT <- read_csv("PIT_final.csv") %>%
  mutate(across(8:94, ~replace_na(.x, 0))) %>%
  mutate(across(8:94, as.numeric))

PIT <- PIT %>% 
  filter(Year %in% c("2021-22", "2022-23", "2023-24", "2024-25", "2025-26"))

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      Site %in% c("Vicky-HS", "Vickys") ~ "Vicky-HS",
      Site %in% c("Turtle Beach", "TurtleB-CooksP") ~ "TurtleB-CooksP",
      Site %in% c("Lag2-Trimodal", "Lagoon") ~ "Lag2-Trimodal",
      Site == "Turtle South - Front (Sargassum)" ~ "TS_Crest",
      Site == "Turtle South - Coral" ~ "TS_Back",
      Site == "Turtle North - front" ~ "TN_Crest",
      TRUE ~ Site
    ),
    Reef = case_when(
      Site %in% c("Day 1", "Day 2", "Day 3") ~ "Day",
      Site %in% c("Hicks 1", "Hicks 2", "Hicks 3") ~ "Hicks",
      Site %in% c("Mac 1", "Mac 2", "Mac 3") ~ "MacGillivray",
      Site %in% c("TN_Back", "TN_coral", "TN_Crest") ~ "Turtle N",
      Site %in% c("TS_Back", "TS_Channel", "TS_Crest") ~ "Turtle S",
      Site %in% c("TurtleB-CooksP", "Lag2-Trimodal", "Vicky-HS") ~ "Lizard",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ))


PIT<- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    Shelf = factor(Shelf),
    Reef = factor(Reef),
    Site = factor(Site))

PIT <- PIT %>%
  mutate(
    # Acroporidae = rowSums(select(., `Acropora - branching`:`Montipora`), na.rm = TRUE),
    # 
    # Pocilloporidae = rowSums(select(., Pocillopora:Stylophora), na.rm = TRUE),
    # 
    # Poritidae = rowSums(select(., `Porites - branching`:Goniopora), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    `Other Hard coral` = rowSums(select(., `Favia (plocoid)`:`other submassive`), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    `Soft coral` = rowSums(select(., Lobophytum:`Soft-other`), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Phaeophyceae` = rowSums(select(., Sargassum:Lobophora), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Rhodophyta` = rowSums(select(., Asparagopsis:Jania), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Chlorophyta`= rowSums(select(., Halimeda:Valonia), na.rm = TRUE),
    `Sand and Rubble` = rowSums(select(., Sand:Rubble), na.rm = TRUE),
    Turf = rowSums(select(., `Pavement/EAM`:`Dead massive`), na.rm = TRUE),
    Other = rowSums(select(., Sponge:Clam), na.rm = TRUE),
    Zoantharian = rowSums(select(., `Zoantharian - Red`:`Zoantharian - Green`), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

PIT <- PIT |> 
  dplyr::select(Year, Shelf, Reef, Site, Transect, `Acropora - branching`:Goniopora, 93:101,CCA, Cyanobacteria, Halophila)

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    sum = rowSums(across(`Acropora - branching`:Halophila), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

summary(PIT$sum)

PIT <- PIT |> 
  mutate(
    across(`Acropora - branching`:Halophila, ~ .x * 2)
  )
# Step 1: Create site-by-species matrix with Site_ID
site_by_PIT <- PIT %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Year, Reef, Shelf, Site, Transect, 6:29
  ) %>%
  mutate(Site_ID = paste(Year, Reef, Site, Transect, sep = "_"))

# Step 2: Metadata (KEEP Site_ID)
metadata_PIT <- site_by_PIT %>%
  dplyr::select(Shelf, Year, Reef, Site)

# Step 3: Species matrix
PIT_matrix_filtered <- site_by_PIT %>%
  dplyr::select(
    `Acropora - branching`:Halophila
  )
```
